heading: United States Section as agency of United States
label: 937 United States Section as agency of United States
text: The United States Section shall, for the purposes of these provisions of title 28, relating to claims against the United States and tort claims procedure, be deemed to be an agency of the United States.1So in original. Probably should be “those”.1
notes: References in TextProvisions of title 28, relating to claims against the United States, referred to in text, include sections 1346(b), 2501 et seq., and 2671 et seq., of Title 28, Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.
